first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the mean score delta is well within the noise band. The textual differences are minor rephrasings and reorderings of the same core points. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate's strengths in full-stack development and open source, and consistently point out the same weaknesses regarding C++ and large-scale cloud experience. The variations in wording are typical of run-to-run noise and do not indicate a change in reasoning based on the candidate's name.
